# TeamPrompt

> TeamPrompt is an AI WorkOS platform that provides two layers of AI protection for teams: network-level AI tool control (via Cloudflare Gateway DNS blocking) and content-level data loss prevention (via browser extension DLP scanning). It also includes a shared prompt library, compliance frameworks, audit dashboards, and LLM-based topic classification.

## What TeamPrompt Does

TeamPrompt helps organizations control and secure how their teams use AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, and Perplexity.

**Layer 1 — Network-Level Control:** Approve trusted AI tools and block everything else at the DNS level via Cloudflare Gateway integration. Covers all devices: browser, native apps, mobile, and CLI tools.

**Layer 2 — Content-Level DLP:** A browser extension scans every outbound prompt in real time for sensitive data. 40+ detection rules catch PII, credentials, API keys, patient data, and more. Three enforcement modes: Block, Warn, or Auto-Redact.

**Additional capabilities:** Shared prompt library with approval workflows, 19 compliance framework packs (HIPAA, SOC 2, PCI-DSS, GDPR, etc.), LLM-based topic classification, risk scoring (0-100 per prompt), Sankey flow audit dashboards, and CSV/PDF export for compliance reporting.

## Key Facts
- Free tier: up to 3 members, 25 prompts
- Pro: $9/user/month (unlimited prompts, 12 members)
- Team: $7/user/month (50 members, full audit trail, custom rules)
- Business: $12/user/month (500 members, unlimited everything)
- Browser extension: Chrome, Firefox, Edge
- AI tools supported: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Perplexity
- Compliance packs: 19 frameworks (HIPAA, SOC 2, PCI-DSS, GDPR, CCPA, FERPA, GLBA, NIST, FedRAMP, and more)
- Detection rules: 40+ built-in (SSN, credit cards, API keys, passwords, patient data, etc.)
- Setup time: under 5 minutes, no proxy or VPN needed

## Product Pages
- [Features](https://teamprompt.app/features): Three layers of AI governance — network control, content DLP, audit & compliance
- [Pricing](https://teamprompt.app/pricing): Free, Pro, Team, and Business plans
- [Security](https://teamprompt.app/security): DLP scanning, detection rules, compliance packs
- [Enterprise](https://teamprompt.app/enterprise): Auto-install browser extension, team-based policies
- [Extensions](https://teamprompt.app/extensions): Browser extension for Chrome, Firefox, Edge
- [Integrations](https://teamprompt.app/integrations): ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, Perplexity, Slack, MCP

## Compliance
- [HIPAA Compliance](https://teamprompt.app/compliance/hipaa): Protect PHI in AI tools
- [SOC 2 Compliance](https://teamprompt.app/compliance/soc2): Audit trails and access controls
- [GDPR Compliance](https://teamprompt.app/compliance/gdpr): EU personal data protection
- [PCI-DSS Compliance](https://teamprompt.app/compliance/pci-dss): Payment card data blocking
- [EU AI Act](https://teamprompt.app/compliance/eu-ai-act): AI governance and transparency

## Comparisons
- [TeamPrompt vs Nightfall AI](https://teamprompt.app/compare/nightfall): Browser DLP vs API-based enterprise DLP
- [TeamPrompt vs Microsoft Purview](https://teamprompt.app/compare/purview): Cross-platform vs Microsoft-only
- [TeamPrompt vs ChatGPT Teams](https://teamprompt.app/compare/chatgpt-teams): What OpenAI's team plan is missing
- [TeamPrompt vs Notion](https://teamprompt.app/compare/notion): Purpose-built prompt management vs general docs
- [Best AI DLP Tools 2026](https://teamprompt.app/compare/best-ai-dlp-tools): Complete market comparison

- [Technology](https://teamprompt.app/industries/technology): API key and source code protection
- [Finance](https://teamprompt.app/industries/finance): PCI-DSS and SOX compliance
- [Government](https://teamprompt.app/industries/government): CUI and FedRAMP alignment
- [Education](https://teamprompt.app/industries/education): FERPA student data protection
- [Insurance](https://teamprompt.app/industries/insurance): Claims and policyholder PII

## Solutions (high-intent landing pages)
- [Prompt Management Platform](https://teamprompt.app/solutions/prompt-management): Centralized vault, version control, approval workflows
- [AI DLP](https://teamprompt.app/solutions/ai-dlp): Real-time scanning to stop sensitive data leaking into AI tools
- [AI Governance Platform](https://teamprompt.app/solutions/ai-governance): Policies, guardrails, audit, and analytics for team AI use
- [AI Prompt Templates](https://teamprompt.app/solutions/prompt-templates): Reusable templates with variables
- [AI Prompt Library Software](https://teamprompt.app/solutions/ai-prompt-library-software): Shared organizational prompt library
